summary: Comprehensive testing of VocalFitness Pop-up Message System completed. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including popup display on client login, OK button, Don't Show Again dismissal, admin popup tab, create/edit/delete/toggle popups.
critical_code_review_comments: Popup system properly integrated with admin and member pages
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Popup dismissal persists correctly via popup_dismissals MongoDB collection
Target user filtering works correctly for specific vs all clients
CTA button fields (button_text, button_url) properly passed through the system
Video/Audio popup types support both direct upload and external links/embeds
seed_data_creation: test.client user created for testing. One popup message exists with title 'Updated Title'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pop-up message system fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/popups, POST /api/admin/popups/upload-media, GET /api/members/popups, POST /api/members/popups/{id}/dismiss. Frontend: Admin tab 'Messaggi Pop-up' (data-testid=tab-popups), popup modal appears on member login, OK closes temporarily, 'Non mostrare più' dismisses permanently.

backend: List popups as admin - GET /api/admin/popups (200 OK)
Create video popup with YouTube embed (200/201)
Inactive popup not visible to client
frontend: Admin login and navigate to admin panel
Create popup modal opens with all fields (title, type, content, media options, CTA, recipients)
Popup modal shows on client login
Popup title and content displayed correctly
'Non mostrare più' (Don't show again) button visible and works
Dismissed popup doesn't appear after page refresh
Admin button NOT visible for client (correct)
CTA button renders when button_text and button_url are set

features_verified: Admin popup tab appears in /admin page with 'Messaggi Pop-up' tab button
Admin can create a text popup message via the popup form modal
Admin can create a video popup message with YouTube link
Admin can edit and delete popup messages
Admin can target specific clients or all clients
Client popup retrieval: GET /api/members/popups returns active popups for the logged-in user
Client popup dismissal: POST /api/members/popups/{popup_id}/dismiss works and popup no longer appears
Popup modal shows correctly on the members area page for a client
Don't show again button dismisses the popup permanently
OK button just closes the popup temporarily
CTA button renders when button_text and button_url are set
